hooks.command: f=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); if [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f package.json ] && npx --no-install prettier --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.mjs|*.scss|*.json|*.md) npx --no-install prettier --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true ;; esac; fi
